recommendations.title: The Lost City
recommendations.overview: Reclusive author Loretta Sage writes about exotic places in her popular adventure novels that feature a handsome cover model named Alan. While on tour promoting her new book with Alan, Loretta gets kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who hopes she

recommendations.title: The Edukators
recommendations.overview: Three activists cobble together a kidnapping plot after they encounter a businessman in his home.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Behind Enemy Lines III: Colombia
recommendations.overview: Navy SEALS mount an attack on Colombian special forces to clear their names and rescue a hostage.

recommendations.title: Inside Man: Most Wanted
recommendations.overview: An NYPD hostage negotiator teams up with a federal agent to rescue dozens of tourists held hostage during a 10-hour seige at the U.S. Federal Reserve.

recommendations.title: Counterattack
recommendations.overview: When a hostage rescue mission creates a new enemy, Capt. Guerrero and his elite soldiers must face an ambush by a criminal group.

recommendations.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
recommendations.overview: A husband and wife struggle to keep their marriage alive until they realize they are both secretly working as assassins. Now, their respective assignments require them to kill each other.

recommendations.title: Tiger Zinda Hai
recommendations.overview: When a group of Indian and Pakistani nurses are held hostage in Iraq by a terrorist organization, a renowned Indian secret agent is drawn out of hiding to rescue them.

recommendations.title: Zoo
recommendations.overview: A couple trying to save their marriage during a zombie apocalypse.

recommendations.title: A Wolf at the Door
recommendations.overview: Love turns to hate and panic breeds suspicion as two parents deal with the kidnapping of their child.
